TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pakwari ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 193 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 148 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 51%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga Quwis awi'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pakwari ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa quwis~ɕ awiʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pakwari ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 57% kyan ku 193 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 43% kyan ku 148 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 51%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pakwari hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pakwari hya' ga Quwis awi'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pakwari ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pakwari ħjaʔ ɣa quwis~ɕ awiʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
